positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric arrangement of celestial bodies and mythical flora. Central subject is a stylized crescent moon cradling blooming bioluminescent lavender and glowing deep-sea anemones. The composition features floating constellations, geometric wireframe orbits, and stylized astrological symbols rendered in deep sapphire blue, iridescent gold, and muted cosmic violet. Use strong contrast between dark, velvety space and radiant light sources. The overall aesthetic should be clean, elegant, and highly graphic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. The style should blend Art Deco geometric precision with mystical botanical illustration, using crisp outlines and flat color blocking, maximizing silhouette readability.
